paragraphs: Yes, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu is suitable for beginners of all ages and fitness levels.
No, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu is for everyone, regardless of current fitness level.
Brazilian Jiu Jitsu emphasizes technique and control, reducing the risk of injury.
Absolutely. Brazilian Jiu Jitsu teaches effective self-defense techniques for individuals of all sizes and strengths.
In your first class, you’ll start with a warm-up followed by instruction on basic techniques and positions.
Yes, many practitioners train for self-improvement, fitness, and camaraderie without competing.

Brazilian Jiu Jitsu can benefit children by promoting discipline, confidence, and physical fitness. Our academy offers a safe environment with experienced instructors adept at engaging children effectively.
Wear comfortable athletic clothing and bring a water bottle to stay hydrated.
bodyText: Infinum BJJ FAQs | Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Training for All Levels HOME ABOUT SCHEDULE BLOG CONTACT US FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS Is Brazilian Jiu Jitsu suitable for Beginners? Yes, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu is suitable for beginners of all ages and fitness levels. Do I need to be in shape to start training Brazilian Jiu Jitsu? No, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu is for everyone, regardless of current fitness level. I'm worried about getting injured. Is Brazilian Jiu Jitsu safe? Brazilian Jiu Jitsu emphasizes technique and control, reducing the risk of injury. Can Brazilian Jiu Jitsu help with self-defense? Absolutely. Brazilian Jiu Jitsu teaches effective self-defense techniques for individuals of all sizes and strengths. What can I expect in my first Brazilian Jiu Jitsu class? In your first class, you’ll start with a warm-up followed by instruction on basic techniques and positions. I'm not interested in competing. Can I still train Brazilian Jiu Jitsu? Yes, many practitioners train for self-improvement, fitness, and camaraderie without competing. What if I'm a parent considering enrolling my child in Brazilian Jiu Jitsu? Brazilian Jiu Jitsu can benefit children by promoting discipline, confidence, and physical fitness. Our academy offers a safe environment with experienced instructors adept at engaging children effectively. What Should I Bring to My First Jiu Jitsu Class? Wear comfortable athletic clothing and bring a water bottle to stay hydrated.
